title: schc_compression.json consumed by Python only; C copy is second-generation from Rust hardcode
description: Python test_vectors.py:86,120-127 reads the JSON (CI). Rust hardcodes the same 5 vectors at codec.rs:957-1015 (content verified identical today). C hardcodes at lichen/tests/schc/main.c:107-175 with an explicit provenance comment 'from rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs' - a second-generation transcription. Zero vector coverage for rules 5/6 anywhere post-26da5423a2, and zero fragmentation vectors in any implementation. (origin/main has rust/lichen-schc/tests/shared_vectors.rs loading the JSON but expects format_version==2, incompatible with this tree's v1 file - resolve on merge.) Fix: JSON loaders in Rust+C; regenerate rule-5/6 vectors once mmgu.3/mmgu.4 land; add fragmentation vectors per mmgu.5.
